name: Dallas Valley Goldmine
description_short: Dallas Valley Goldmine buys and sells precious metals, jewelry, coins, and diamonds across 12 DFW locations. They claim to pay up to 50% more than competitors and offer same-day appointments.
description_long:
Dallas Valley Goldmine has operated since 2008 as a precious metals buyer with 12 locations throughout the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area. The company specializes in purchasing gold, silver, platinum, and diamonds from customers who want to convert jewelry and precious items into cash. They position themselves as a fair-price alternative to mail-in services like Cash4Gold and other local buyers, citing an ABC News undercover investigation that allegedly showed they paid customers up to 50% more than competitors.

The company's core service is one-on-one appraisals of precious metal items and jewelry. They buy necklaces, rings, bracelets, earrings, dental gold, crowns, sterling silverware, tea sets, coins, and bullion. Customers schedule private appointments at their choosing, and transactions are completed on-site with same-day payment via check. They claim to use licensed, certified scales visible to customers during evaluation and check real-time market prices before making offers. They also operate a retail side, selling bullion, bars, and coins to the public.

Dallas Valley Goldmine distinguishes itself through transparency about the appraisal process and stated willingness to advise customers if items might fetch better prices elsewhere. They emphasize professional assessment and one-on-one service rather than high-pressure sales tactics. The company holds an A+ Better Business Bureau rating and advertises a 4.9 out of 5 average customer rating. They offer extended hours (7 days a week) and special accommodation for customers over 60 or disabled.

However, significant caveats apply: The ABC News claim is unverified and not independently documented on the website. As with all precious metals buyers, customers depend entirely on the company's scales, pricing, and market assessment—there is inherent information asymmetry favoring the buyer. No independent verification of ratings or BBB status is provided. The appointment-only model limits walk-in access and may discourage price shopping.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 12 locations across Dallas-Fort Worth area with same-day appointment availability
Claims ABC News investigation found they pay up to 50% more than other local gold buyers
Transparent appraisal process with visible, licensed certified scales
States they will advise customers if items might fetch better prices elsewhere
One-on-one private appointments emphasizing customer comfort and security
Same-day payment via check with no pressure-sales approach
A+ Better Business Bureau rating and 4.9 out of 5 average customer rating
Extended hours (7 days a week) and special accommodation for seniors and disabled customers
cons: ABC News investigation claim is cited but not independently verifiable on the website
Appointment-only model prevents walk-in price shopping and comparison
Inherent information asymmetry—customers must rely on the company's scales and market pricing interpretation
No independent third-party verification of ratings or BBB status provided
No transparency about buying margins, fees, or how they calculate offers relative to spot prices
best_for: People with unwanted estate jewelry, coins, or dental gold looking for a local buyer
Customers seeking to sell precious metals during market peaks and wanting quick payment
Seniors (60+) or disabled individuals who prefer in-person, private appointment-based transactions
Those wanting to compare offers locally before selling (though appointment-only limits this)
diagnosis: Dallas Valley Goldmine is best for DFW-area customers with precious metals or jewelry to liquidate who value local, in-person transactions and want an alternative to mail-in buyers. The main caveat is that the company's central claim—paying 50% more than competitors per ABC News—is unverifiable on the website, and customers have limited ability to shop other buyers due to the appointment-only model, creating potential for information asymmetry in the buyer's favor.
services: Silver jewelry and sterling silverware buying
Diamond and gemstone appraisal and buying
Dental gold and gold crowns buying
Precious metals bullion and bars retail sales
Retail sales of gold, silver, and platinum bullion
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
